ai_summary: **Executive Summary: Akme Fintrade (AFIL) Q4 & FY24 Earnings Conference Call Transcript**  Akme Fintrade (AFIL) reported strong FY24 PAT growth of 27.62% with healthy net profit margins and a robust 49.86% CRAR following its IPO. Despite ambitious expansion plans, the company's FY24 AUM and total income growth were modest, contributing to a low 8.32% ROE due to being significantly under-leveraged. The material impact and key challenge will be the aggressive and rapid execution required to significantly scale disbursements (targeting INR 300 Cr in FY25) to effectively deploy its substantial capital, improve ROE, and mitigate the risk of underperformance.
